name: command registry index lists exactly /spec /plan-first and /review-panel as kept-or-renamed entries
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/list-reconciled.sh" 2>out.txt && grep -q '^/spec' out.txt && grep -q '^/plan-first' out.txt && grep -q '^/review-panel' out.txt && ! grep -qE '^/review$' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
